meaning: On the weekday (Mon–Fri) closest to the 15th day of the month. (Quartz '15W': if the 15th is a weekend, the nearest weekday is used.)

topic: hour enumeration: a range followed by an isolated hour
meaning: At the hours 9 through 20 inclusive, AND ALSO at 22 o'clock (22 is a separate hour; 21 is excluded — it must NOT read as the range extending to 22).

topic: hour enumeration: an isolated hour followed by a range
meaning: At 9 o'clock, AND at the hours 17 through 19 inclusive. (9 is a single hour; 17–19 is a range.)
